heading: Enlisted members: officers not to use as servants
label: 9239 Enlisted members: officers not to use as servants
text: No officer of the Air Force or the Space Force may use an enlisted member of the Air Force or the Space Force as a servant.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)863910:608.R.S. 1232.The words “in any case whatever” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “Air Force” in two places.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8639 of this title
